entries.value: Ka caawi inspir inay ku habboonaato da'daada

entries.source: Tell us your date of birth so we can build an age-appropriate learning experience. We use it to adjust examples, tone, and safety boundaries.
entries.value: Noo sheeg taariikhdaada dhalasho si aan u dhisno khibrad waxbarasho oo ku habboon da'daada. Waxaan u isticmaalnaa si aan u hagaajino tusaalooyinka, codka, iyo xuduudaha badbaadada.

entries.source: Please enter a valid date of birth.
entries.value: Fadlan geli taariikh dhalasho oo sax ah.

entries.source: - Apply constraints around language, rank, gender, class, law, religion, money, sanitation, and access.
entries.value: - Codso xaddidaadaha ku saabsan luqadda, darajada, jinsiga, fasalka, sharciga, diinta, lacagta, nadaafadda, iyo helitaanka.

entries.source: - Before the person speaks, build the room: where we are, year or date range, what has happened so far, current pressures, beliefs, blind spots, and historian uncertainties.
entries.value: - Kahor inta uusan qofku hadlin, dhis qolka: halka aan joogno, sanadka ama xilliga, waxa dhacay ilaa hadda, cadaadiska hadda jira, caqiidooyinka, meelaha aan la garanayn, iyo hubanti la'aanta taariikhyahanka.

entries.source: - Create a dossier wall with: timeline so far, personal stakes, allies and enemies, major beliefs at this time, blind spots, known writings or speeches, current pressure, historical context, evidence quality, and recommended opening questions.
entries.value: - Samee gidaar dukumiinti ah oo leh: jadwalka waqtiga ilaa hadda, danaha shakhsi ahaaneed, xulafada iyo cadawga, caqiidooyinka waaweyn ee xilligan, meelaha aan la garanayn, qoraallada ama khudbadaha la yaqaan, cadaadiska hadda jira, macnaha taariikhiga ah, tayada caddaynta, iyo su'aalaha furitaanka ee lagu taliyay.

entries.source: - Do not fabricate direct quotes, citations, or private thoughts.
entries.value: - Ha been-abuurin xigashooyin toos ah, tixraacyo, ama fikrado gaar ah.

entries.source: - Do not fabricate exact quotations. If a direct quotation is not sourced in the conversation, mark generated wording as a modernized paraphrase or reconstructed dialogue.
entries.value: - Ha been-abuurin xigashooyin sax ah. Haddii xigasho toos ah aan laga helin wada-hadalka, ku calaamadee ereyada la soo saaray inay yihiin weedho casri ah ama wada-hadal dib loo dhisay.

entries.source: - Do not romanticize violence, empire, slavery, caste, disease, or oppression.
entries.value: - Ha qurxin rabshadaha, boqortooyada, addoonsiga, kala-sarreynta, cudurrada, ama dulmiga.

entries.source: - Do not sanitize harmful views, and do not glorify oppression, casteism, racism, slavery, misogyny, authoritarianism, or violence. Context is not automatic excuse.
entries.value: - Ha nadiifin aragtiyaha waxyeellada leh, hana ammaanin dulmiga, kala-sarreynta, cunsuriyadda, addoonsiga, nacaybka haweenka, kalitalisnimada, ama rabshadaha. Macnaha guud maaha cudurdaar toos ah.

entries.source: - End with three meaningful actions plus one option to pause for historian context.
entries.value: - Ku soo gabagabee saddex tallaabo oo macno leh oo lagu daray hal ikhtiyaar oo lagu hakiyo macnaha taariikhyahanka.

entries.source: - If any destination field is AI-resolved or vague, first offer three concrete historically meaningful arrival options and wait for the learner to choose.
entries.value: - Haddii goob kasta oo loo socdo ay tahay mid AI-go'aamisay ama aan caddayn, marka hore bixi saddex ikhtiyaar oo dhab ah oo taariikh ahaan macno leh oo sug inuu baruhu doorto.

entries.source: - Maintain two layers after the encounter begins: in-character voice bounded by the time slice, and historian sidecar notes that distinguish documented fact, plausible reconstruction, contested interpretation, modern paraphrase, and fictionalized dialogue.
entries.value: - Ilaali laba lakab ka dib marka kulanku bilaabmo: codka dabeecadda oo ku xaddidan xilliga, iyo qoraallada dhinaca taariikhyahanka oo kala saaraya xaqiiqooyinka la diiwaangeliyay, dib-u-dhiska la aamini karo, tafsiirka la isku haysto, weedhaha casriga ah, iyo wada-hadalka khayaaliga ah.

entries.source: - Mark known facts, plausible reconstruction, and speculation clearly.
entries.value: - Si cad u calaamadee xaqiiqooyinka la yaqaan, dib-u-dhiska la aamini karo, iyo mala-awaalka.

entries.source: - Otherwise, greet the traveler, summarize the passport in one compact paragraph, then ask the first meaningful action question.
entries.value: - Haddii kale, salaam socdaalka, ku soo koob baasaboorka hal cutub oo kooban, ka dibna weydii su'aasha ugu horreysa ee tallaabada macnaha leh.

entries.source: - The historical person may resist, challenge, evade, ask questions back, reject false premises, or reveal period constraints. They should not be infinitely agreeable.
entries.value: - Qofka taariikhiga ah wuu iska caabin karaa, caqabad ku noqon karaa, ka dhuuman karaa, su'aalo dib u weydiin karaa, diidi karaa qoraallada been abuurka ah, ama muujin karaa xaddidaadaha xilliga. Waa inaysan noqon kuwo mar walba raali ah.

entries.source: 1. If discovery or time-slice choice is needed, show choices and stop.
entries.value: 1. Haddii loo baahdo helitaan ama doorashada xilliga, muuji xulashooyinka oo jooji.

entries.source: 2. Otherwise show the dossier wall first, then invite me to begin with one of the recommended questions.
entries.value: 2. Haddii kale marka hore muuji gidaarka faylka, ka dibna igu martiqaad inaan ku bilaabo mid ka mid ah su'aalaha lagu taliyay.

entries.source: A bad name can confuse, but the clue points to timing. First prove whether the data has arrived.
entries.value: Magac xun ayaa jahwareerin kara, laakiin tilmaantu waxay tilmaamaysaa wakhtiga. Marka hore xaqiiji in xogtu ay timid.

entries.source: A few facts, a rough draft, where you are stuck...
entries.value: Dhowr xaqiiqo, qoraal qabyo ah, meesha aad ku xayiran tahay...

entries.source: A final transfer task proves improvement better than a Next button.
entries.value: Hawl wareejin kama dambays ah ayaa si fiican u caddaynaysa horumarka marka loo eego badhanka Xiga.
Fikirka gaarka ah ee qof goobjooge ahaa

entries.source: A paragraph that lists facts without a claim makes the reader do the argument work.
entries.value: Cutub liis gareeya xaqiiqooyinka iyada oo aan lahayn sheegasho waxay ka dhigaysaa akhristaha inuu sameeyo shaqada doodda.

entries.source: A price change alone is movement along a curve, not automatically a shift of the whole curve.
entries.value: Isbeddelka qiimaha oo keliya waa dhaqdhaqaaq ku socda qalooca, ee maaha si toos ah u wareejinta qalooca oo dhan.

entries.source: A shared goal, next actions, and what is already done.
entries.value: Hadaf la wadaago, tallaabooyinka xiga, iyo waxa hore loo qabtay.

entries.source: A simulation makes the hidden causal chain visible. Change one thing at a time.
entries.value: Jiliddu waxay ka dhigaysaa silsiladda sababaha qarsoon mid muuqata. Beddel hal shay markiiba.

entries.source: A single check question before moving forward.
entries.value: Hal su'aal oo hubin ah ka hor inta aanad hore u socon.
Qorshaha gaarka ah ee hal ganacsade

entries.source: A strategy framework is a pressure test. Porter's Five Forces asks who can take profit away and how strong each pressure is.
entries.value: Qaab-dhismeedka istiraatiijiyaddu waa imtixaan cadaadis. Porter's Five Forces waxay waydiisaa cidda qaadan karta faa'iidada iyo sida uu u xooggan yahay cadaadis kasta.

entries.source: A strong paragraph names the claim, proves it with evidence, then explains why the evidence changes the reader's view.
entries.value: Cutub xooggan wuxuu magacaabaa sheegashada, wuxuu ku caddeeyaa caddayn, ka dibna wuxuu sharxayaa sababta caddayntu u beddesho aragtida akhristaha.

entries.source: A useful model is a chain: assumptions drive operations, operations create cash flow, and cash flow becomes value only after timing and risk are considered.
entries.value: Qaab waxtar leh waa silsilad: mala-awaalku wuxuu kaxeeyaa hawlgallada, hawlgalladu waxay abuuraan qulqulka lacagta, qulqulka lacagtuna wuxuu qiimo noqdaa oo keliya ka dib marka la tixgeliyo wakhtiga iyo khatarta.

entries.source: Accept, edit, or reject the next AI pass
entries.value: Aqbal, wax ka beddel, ama diid tallaabada xigta ee AI

entries.source: Accept, revise, reject, or gather evidence.
entries.value: Aqbal, dib u eeg, diid, ama ururi caddayn.

entries.source: Account tokens and a modest coin pouch
entries.value: Astaamaha xisaabta iyo boorso yar oo qadaadiic ah
Ada Lovelace oo ku saabsan male-awaalka

entries.source: Ada Lovelace, Cleopatra, B. R. Ambedkar...
entries.value: Ada Lovelace, Cleopatra, B. R. Ambedkar...

entries.source: Add, edit, challenge, or decide the next move
entries.value: Ku dar, wax ka beddel, caqabad ku samee, ama go'aanso tallaabada xigta

entries.source: Adding more information when the real gap is the link between evidence and claim.
entries.value: Ku darista macluumaad dheeraad ah marka farqiga dhabta ahi uu yahay xidhiidhka ka dhexeeya caddaynta iyo sheegashada.

entries.source: Agora during the days around Socrates' trial
entries.value: Agora intii lagu jiray maalmihii ku xeernaa maxkamadayntii Socrates
AI ayaa dib u eegis ku samaynaysa farshaxankaaga
AI ayaa samaysay qaabkii ugu horreeyay
AI ayaa dib u habaysay goobta shaqada

entries.source: Akbar ruled the Mughal Empire in this period
entries.value: Akbar wuxuu xukumay Boqortooyada Mughal muddadan

entries.source: Akbar's Mughal court is experimenting with sovereignty, translation, religion, and imperial administration.
entries.value: Maxkamadda Mughal ee Akbar waxay tijaabinaysaa madax-bannaanida, turjumaadda, diinta, iyo maamulka boqortooyada.

entries.source: All app text and tutoring replies follow this setting.
entries.value: Dhammaan qoraalka abka iyo jawaabaha macallinka waxay raacaan goobtan.

entries.source: Answer this question before moving on.
entries.value: Ka jawaab su'aashan ka hor inta aadan sii wadin.

entries.source: Apply the idea to a new situation without being carried.
entries.value: Fikradda ku dabaq xaalad cusub adigoon la qaadin.

entries.source: Arabic and Sanskrit in scholarly contexts
entries.value: Carabi iyo Sanskrit oo ku jira xaaladaha cilmi-baarista

entries.source: Argument paragraph = claim + evidence + reasoning + consequence.
entries.value: Cutubka doodda = sheegasho + caddayn + sababayn + cawaaqib.

entries.source: Arrival date, role, norms, and what knowledge belongs in that period.
entries.value: Taariikhda imaatinka, doorka, xeerarka, iyo aqoonta ka jirta xilligaas.

entries.source: Arrive near a turning point and track what people know then.
entries.value: Ka soo deg meel u dhow isbeddelka oo la soco waxa dadku yaqaaniin markaas.

entries.source: Ask a metic what citizenship excludes
entries.value: Weydii qof metic ah waxa dhalashadu ka reebto

entries.source: Ask a water carrier what locals know
entries.value: Weydii qof biyo-qaade ah waxa dadka deegaanku yaqaaniin

entries.source: Ask for a hint or example
Ask for advice through their period worldview and constraints.
entries.value: Weydii talo adigoo eegaya aragtidooda adduunka iyo caqabadaha xilligaas.

entries.source: Ask for hints, examples, or checks before a final answer.
entries.value: Weydii tilmaamo, tusaalooyin, ama hubin ka hor jawaabta kama dambaysta ah.

entries.source: Ask for the next hint level
Ask for the same question in simpler words
entries.value: Weydii su'aashan oo kale erayo fudud
Weydii sida uu u shaqeeyo heerka xorriyadda
Weydii sida ay u shaqeyso taageeriddu (patronage)

entries.source: Ask me for my current hypothesis first.
entries.value: Marka hore i weydii mala-awaalkayga hadda.

entries.source: Ask one question at a time, track assumptions and evidence, offer hints on request, and do not synthesize until I have tried.
entries.value: Weydii hal su'aal markiiba, la soco mala-awaalka iyo caddaynta, bixi tilmaamo marka la codsado, hana soo koobin ilaa aan isku dayo.

entries.source: Ask the guide to explain the power structure
entries.value: Weydii hagaha inuu sharxo qaab-dhismeedka awoodda

entries.source: Ask the historian to propose time slices
entries.value: Weydii taariikhyahan inuu soo jeediyo qaybo waqti ah

entries.source: Ask the watchman what orders exist
Ask to save major claims and classify their evidence strength.
entries.value: Weydii in la kaydiyo sheegashooyinka waaweyn oo la kala saaro xoogga caddayntooda.

entries.source: Ask, act, pause for context, or request a debrief...
entries.value: Weydii, samee, hakad u gal macnaha, ama codso warbixin...

entries.source: Ask, challenge, request evidence, or open a dossier item...
entries.value: Weydii, caqabad geli, codso caddayn, ama fur shay ka mid ah faylka...

entries.source: Assistant to a trading household or workshop
Assumptions will appear as they surface.
entries.value: Mala-awaalku wuxuu soo bixi doonaa marka ay dusha u soo baxaan.
Marka ugu sarreysa saamaynta ama awoodda
Marka la gaaro barta go'aanka leh

entries.source: Attack the most fragile assumption first.
entries.value: Weerari mala-awaalka ugu nugul marka hore.

entries.source: Attractiveness rises when customers, suppliers, rivals, entrants, and substitutes have limited power.
entries.value: Soojiidashadu way korodhaa marka macaamiisha, alaab-qeybiyeyaasha, tartamayaasha, kuwa soo galaya suuqa, iyo beddelka ay leeyihiin awood xaddidan.

entries.source: Baghdad during the House of Wisdom
Bahadur Shah Zafar became a symbolic focus
entries.value: Bahadur Shah Zafar wuxuu noqday xarun calaamad u ah

entries.source: Begin with a persona card, then answer in character with brief context notes and suggested follow-up questions.
entries.value: Ku bilow kaarka shakhsiyadda, ka dibna ku jawaab adigoo adeegsanaya qoraallo kooban oo macnaha guud ah iyo su'aalo daba-gal ah oo la soo jeediyay.
Bilow, u diyaar garowga imtixaanka, horumarsan, da'da 12...
Caqiidooyinka iyo meelaha indhaha ka qarsan

entries.source: Best for money, logistics, food, routes, and social exchange.
entries.value: Ugu fiican lacagta, saadka, cuntada, waddooyinka, iyo isweydaarsiga bulshada.

entries.source: Best for politics, institutions, evidence, and elite-adjacent spaces.
entries.value: Ugu fiican siyaasadda, hay'adaha, caddaymaha, iyo meelaha u dhow dadka sare.
Roodhida iyo sharcinimada ayaa ku badan hadalka

entries.source: Break the work into tasks, track blockers, keep the decision log current, and push toward a concrete output.
entries.value: Shaqada u qaybi hawlo, la soco caqabadaha, cusboonaysii diiwaanka go'aamada, oo ku dadaal sidii aad u gaari lahayd natiijo la taaban karo.
Qayb ka mid ah qoraal gacmeedka Budhiistaha

entries.source: Bug fix loop = reproduce, isolate, hypothesize, test one change, verify.
entries.value: Wareegga hagaajinta khaladaadka = soo saar, gooni u sooc, qiyaas, tijaabi hal isbeddel, xaqiiji.

entries.source: Build a lesson that reacts to you.

entries.value: dhis qaab maskaxeed la isticmaali karo

entries.source: Build an essay outline on climate adaptation
entries.value: Dhis qorshe qoraal oo ku saabsan la qabsiga cimilada

entries.source: Build momentum, make a useful first pass, and ask for decisions without overpraising.
entries.value: Dhis dardar, samee marinkii ugu horreeyay ee waxtar leh, oo weydii go'aamo adigoon buunbuunin.

entries.source: Build the lesson around what you want to become able to do.
entries.value: Casharka u dhis waxa aad rabto inaad awood u yeelato inaad samayso.
Si wada jir ah u dhis sharraxaadda luqad fudud.

entries.source: Build understanding by answering one precise question at a time.
entries.value: Dhis fahamka adigoo ka jawaabaya hal su'aal oo sax ah markiiba.

entries.source: Buyer tastes are only one driver. Costs, technology, taxes, and input prices can move supply.
entries.value: Dhadhanka iibsaduhu waa hal darawal oo keliya. Kharashaadka, tignoolajiyada, canshuuraha, iyo qiimaha wax-soo-saarka ayaa beddeli kara sahayda.
Qolka golaha wasiirada intii lagu jiray dagaalkii Britain

entries.source: Calling every price movement a demand shift.
entries.value: In loo yeero dhaqdhaqaaq kasta oo qiimo ah isbeddel baahi.

entries.source: Center of power, street-level life, and the edge of the system reveal different histories.
entries.value: Xarunta awoodda, nolosha heerka waddada, iyo cidhifka nidaamku waxay muujinayaan taariikho kala duwan.
La loolan Churchill oo ku saabsan boqortooyada

entries.source: Challenge ideas while the person defends the worldview of their moment.
entries.value: La loolan fikradaha inta qofku difaacayo aragtida adduunka ee xilligiisa.

entries.source: Challenge my last answer with one counterexample, boundary case, or hidden assumption. Ask only one question.
entries.value: Ku loolan jawaabtaydii ugu dambaysay hal tusaale oo ka soo horjeeda, xaalad xaddidan, ama malo qarsoon. Weydii hal su'aal oo keliya.

entries.source: Challenge the tension between fighting tyranny in Europe and defending empire.
entries.value: La loolan xiisadda u dhaxaysa la dagaalanka kalitalisnimada Yurub iyo difaaca boqortooyada.

entries.source: Challenge the weakest part of the current artifact. Be direct, name the assumption, and ask me to defend or revise it.
entries.value: La loolan qaybta ugu daciifsan ee shayga hadda jira. Toos u hadal, magacow malaha, oo i weydii inaan difaaco ama wax ka beddelo.

entries.source: Challenge weak assumptions, vague claims, and missing evidence while keeping the user as decision owner.
entries.value: La loolan malo-awaalka daciifka ah, sheegashooyinka aan caddayn, iyo caddaymaha maqan adigoo isticmaalaha u daaya go'aan qaadashada.

entries.source: Change inputs and explain the output.
entries.value: Beddel waxyaabaha la geliyo oo sharrax waxa ka soo baxaya.

entries.source: Changes syntax before checking execution order.
entries.value: Beddel naxwaha ka hor inta aan la hubin habka fulinta.

entries.source: Changing several files at once may hide the actual cause even if the symptom disappears.
entries.value: Beddelidda faylal dhowr ah hal mar waxay qarin kartaa sababta dhabta ah xitaa haddii calaamaduhu baaba'aan.
Hubi fahamka ka hor inta aanad sii wadin

entries.source: Check whether the async result is awaited before reading it.
entries.value: Hubi in natiijada async la sugayo ka hor inta aan la akhrin.

entries.source: Choose a concept and starting level. Your tutor teaches a small piece, checks it, then adjusts after every reply.
entries.value: Dooro fikrad iyo heerka bilowga. Macallinkaagu wuxuu ku barayaa qayb yar, wuu hubinayaa, ka dibna wuu hagaajinayaa jawaab kasta ka dib.
Dooro barta saxda ah ee laga soo galo

entries.source: Choose the relationship and the purpose of the room.

entries.value: Dooro barta ugu muhiimsan ee laga soo galo.
muwaadin-dacwad oogaha oo tijaabinaya mala-awaalka boqortooyada

entries.source: Citizens weigh piety, education, and loyalty
entries.value: Muwaadiniintu waxay miisaamaan cibaadada, waxbarashada, iyo daacadnimada

entries.source: Classifies actors before reading the behavior.
entries.value: Waxay kala saartaa jilayaasha ka hor inta aan la akhrin dabeecadda.

entries.source: Close, but one link is missing
entries.value: Waa u dhowdahay, laakiin hal xiriiriye ayaa ka maqan
Xirmo maro ah oo la qaybiyay
Dharku wuxuu si degdeg ah u muujiyaa darajada

entries.source: Collect examples, facts, quotes, or constraints that support the work.
entries.value: Ururi tusaalooyin, xaqiiqooyin, xigashooyin, ama xaddidaadyo taageeraya shaqada.

entries.source: Compare intentions, contemporary criticism, later consequences, and modern judgement without reducing the person to hero or villain.
entries.value: Isbarbar dhig ujeedooyinka, dhaleeceynta casriga ah, cawaaqibka dambe, iyo xukunka casriga ah adigoon qofka u dhimin geesi ama shar-wad.
Isbarbar dhig macluumaadka fallaagada iyo Shirkadda
Isbarbar dhig laba kiis oo u dhow.

entries.source: Compress the idea into one usable mental model.
entries.value: Fikradda ku soo koob hal qaab-dhismeed maskaxeed oo la isticmaali karo.

entries.source: Concision helps only after the argument works. Length is not the main diagnosis here.
entries.value: Koobitaanku wuxuu caawiyaa oo kaliya marka dooddu shaqeyso. Dhererku maaha ogaanshaha ugu weyn halkan.

entries.source: Confront contradictions, evasions, and consequences with evidence support.
entries.value: Ka hor tag iska horimaadyada, ka fogaanshaha, iyo cawaaqibka iyadoo la taageerayo caddayn.

entries.source: Confuses movement along demand with a demand shift.
entries.value: Wuxuu ku wareersan yahay dhaqdhaqaaqa baahida iyo isbeddelka baahida.

entries.source: Confusing accounting profit with cash that can actually be distributed or reinvested.
entries.value: Ku wareerinta faa'iidada xisaabaadka lacagta dhabta ah ee la qaybin karo ama dib loo maalgelin karo.

entries.source: connect assumptions, cash flow, and valuation
entries.value: isku xir mala-awaalka, socodka lacagta, iyo qiimeynta

entries.source: Conservative local outer layers chosen by the guide
entries.value: Lakabyada dibadda ee maxalliga ah ee muxaafidka ah oo uu doortay hagaha
Macnaha guud macnaheedu maaha in la taageeray
